mnemonics.title: Regression = Real numbers
mnemonics.content: Regression predicts Real (continuous) values. Classification predicts Categories. Remember: R for Regression and Real numbers.

mnemonics.title: DI Variables
mnemonics.content: Dependent = Output (what we predict). Independent = Input (what we use to predict). D comes after I in the pipeline.

mnemonics.title: LINE Assumptions
mnemonics.content: Linearity, Independence of errors, Normality of errors, Equal variance (homoscedasticity) - the four key assumptions of linear regression.

mnemonics.title: Residual = Reality - Prediction
mnemonics.content: Residual = Actual - Predicted. Positive residual means model underpredicted. Negative means overpredicted.

mnemonics.title: Simple vs Multiple
mnemonics.content: Simple = Single predictor (y = mx + b). Multiple = Many predictors (y = b0 + b1x1 + b2x2 + ...).
